en.name_en: Hojo Clan Tiger-Seal Edict Board
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, an edict board (seisatsu) bearing the Hojo clan's tiger seal. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City on 1971-05-01. It is located at Ryuko-ji, Takane-cho 401.

en.name_en: Calligraphy of Ikuta Yorozu
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, the calligraphy (shoseki) of Ikuta Yorozu. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City on 1973-04-01. It is held at the First Museum, Shiro-machi 3-1.

en.name_en: Bronze Bell
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a bronze bell (dōshō). It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City on 1975-03-06. It is located at Fusai-ji, Habatsuke-cho 1691.

en.name_en: Map of the Tatebayashi Castle Town
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a pictorial map (ezu) of the Tatebayashi castle town. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City on 1977-08-30. It is located at Chiyoda-cho 4-29.

en.name_en: Letter of Matsudaira Takechika (Sansho)
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a letter (shojō) of Matsudaira Takechika, known as the Sansho letter. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City on 1978-05-25. It is held at the First Museum, Shiro-machi 3-1.
